extDesc.message: All-in-one focus toolkit: smart tasks, Pomodoro timer, site blocker, gamification — 100% local, no account needed.

deepWorkMessage.message: You are in the middle of a focus session. Don't break your streak.

focusModeMessage.message: You have tasks to complete. Are you sure you want to spend time here?

continueAnyway.message: I really need this for work (Continue)

typeToProceed.message: Type the following text exactly to proceed:

noActiveTasks.message: No active tasks! You're all caught up.

noCompletedTasks.message: You haven't completed any tasks yet.

quote1.message: I am choosing short-term comfort over long-term goals.

quote2.message: Procrastination is the thief of time and the grave of opportunity.

quote3.message: Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.

settingsNotificationsDesc.message: Get reminded 10, 5, and 0 minutes before tasks

achvSpeedDemonDesc.message: Complete a task within 10 minutes of starting

achvPerfectTimingDesc.message: Complete a task exactly at the scheduled time

msgReminder10_1.message: 10 minutes until "{task}". Time to wrap up whatever you're pretending to do.

msgReminder10_2.message: In 10 minutes: "{task}". The clock is ticking, and so is my patience.

msgReminder10_3.message: "{task}" in 10 minutes. Just a friendly heads-up from your digital overlord.

msgReminder5_1.message: 5 minutes until "{task}". This is getting serious.

msgReminder5_2.message: "{task}" in 5 minutes. No pressure, but also... pressure.

msgReminder5_3.message: T-minus 5 minutes to "{task}". Abort scrolling immediately.

msgReminder0_2.message: "{task}" is NOW. The moment of truth has arrived.

msgNudge_1.message: Hey, shouldn't you be doing "{task}" instead?

msgNudge_2.message: This doesn't look like "{task}" to me...

msgNudge_3.message: Focus mode is ON. "{task}" is waiting for you.

msgNudge_4.message: Are you sure this is productive? "{task}" says hi.

msgTaskComplete_1.message: Done! One less thing on the list.

msgTaskComplete_2.message: Task crushed! You're on fire today.

msgTaskComplete_3.message: Checked off! The productivity gods are pleased.

onb1Subtitle.message: Protect your time, build your legacy.

onb1Desc.message: A smart task manager that blocks distractions, tracks your focus, and rewards your productivity.

onb1Feat2.message: Deep Work sessions with site blocking

onb2Desc.message: Timed focus sessions. Distracting sites get blocked. Typing challenge to bypass.

onb2Feat2.message: Hard lock mode — no escape until done

onb2Feat3.message: Ambient sounds to stay in the zone

onb3Desc.message: Press Ctrl+Shift+Space on any page to add a task instantly.

onb3Feat3.message: Right-click any page to save as task

onb4Subtitle.message: Your data never leaves your browser.

onb4Desc.message: No accounts, no servers, no tracking. Everything stays on your device.

onb4Feat1.message: All data stored locally in your browser

onb4Feat3.message: Enable in Incognito for full site blocking
